prediction.reasoning: Predicting stock prices, even in the very short-term, is highly uncertain due to the influence of numerous market factors. However, based on historical data of daily stock movements, MRK tends to have moderate volatility on a daily basis. A point estimate slightly above the current price reflects a small expectation of growth based on recent trends or sentiment. The confidence intervals are constructed to capture anywhere from typical day-to-day fluctuations to larger, less frequent moves, acknowledging the inherent unpredictability of the market.
